intent: Remove the deprecated markupsafe.soft_unicode public export/shim and require consumers to use soft_str instead; the same change updates the package tests and fixtures so the old export is no longer part of the supported contract.
notes:

Workflow inputs and target identical: pallets/markupsafe@7856c3d, target-install=true, scope=tests/test_markupsafe.py.
